milestones: A solution.py file exists and contains syntactically valid Python code that can be parsed without errors
Tasks can be defined with at minimum name, description, priority, and required resources fields represented as class attributes or data structures
Task assignment to agents is implemented with dynamic reassignment logic that considers agent availability and task urgency/priority
Real-time progress tracking is implemented providing completion status, estimated time to completion, and issue reporting for tasks
An agent communication mechanism exists (e.g., messaging, chat, or shared status updates) allowing agents to coordinate with each other
A history log is maintained that records task start times, end times, assigned agents, and notes or feedback from task execution
